properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our God is great and glorious We put our trust in your name, Jesus Able to save and deliver us We put our hope in Your name, Jesus…

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your blessing and honor glory and power Unto our God forever and ever All of the honors, all of the praise is yours Yours forever…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah…, hallelujah… Our God reigns Hallelujah…, hallelujah… Our God reigns

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And our God is mighty and marvelous We put our trust in Your name, Jesus There's nothing to fear You are here with us (oh, Lord) We put our hope in Your name, Jesus

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Blessing and honor (blessing and honor) Glory and power Unto our God Forever and ever All of the honors, all of the praise is yours Yours forever…

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Our God is in control, steadfast, immovable Nothing is impossible, 'cause our God reigns forever Our God is in control, steadfast, immovable Nothing is impossible, 'cause our God reigns…

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hallelujah…, hallelujah… Our God Hallelujah…, hallelujah… Our God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Our God is in control, steadfast, immovable Nothing is impossible, our God reigns forever Our God is in control, steadfast, immovable Nothing is impossible, our God reigns…
